diagrams.description: Education Policy encompasses the principles and government actions that shape education systems. This flowchart shows a streamlined policy process: the ultimate goal is equitable, high‑quality, and efficient education. Agenda setting identifies problems and priorities. Policy formulation draws on core areas—funding, curriculum, teacher quality, assessment, inclusion, and governance—to design policy options. Once adopted, the policy is implemented and evaluated. Evaluation results feed back into agenda setting and ultimately lead to outcomes such as improved student achievement, reduced opportunity gaps, and a skilled workforce.
